name: merkle audit log: hash is computed over canonical JSON (sorted keys, no whitespace) so reformatting one line does not break verification
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/audit-log.sh" --append --event a --actor t --data '{"b":2,"a":1}' && node -e 'const fs=require("fs");let l=fs.readFileSync(".claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl","utf8").trim();const j=JSON.parse(l);const reordered=JSON.stringify(j,Object.keys(j).reverse());fs.writeFileSync(".claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl",reordered+"\n")' && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/audit-log.sh" --verify-chain && echo ok 1>&2
